title: Act 3/2025
text: Complaint lodged before the Hellenic Competition Commission by the company under the name “TESMA S.A.” (hereinafter referred to as “TESMA” or “the complainant”) against the companies under the names a) “KSB SE & Co. KGaA”, b) “EFARMOGES ANTLISIS (Pumping Applications) S.A.” and c) “KPUMPS PC” alleging unlawful practices in breach of Articles 1 and 2 of Law 3959/2011 and Articles 101 and 102 TFEU in the water pump distribution market. Act 3/2025 File (PDF) Act 3/2025 Date of Issuance of Act March 31st, 2025 Legal Framework Distribution of pumps and related equipment in the Greek territory Subject of the Act The complaint lodged in 2022 before the Hellenic Competition Commission by the company under the name “TESMA S.A.” (hereinafter referred to as “TESMA” or “the complainant”) against the companies under the names a) “KSB SE & Co. KGaA”, b) “EFARMOGES ANTLISIS (Pumping Applications) S.A.” and c) “KPUMPS PC” alleging unlawful practices in breach of Articles 1 and 2 of Law 3959/2011 and Articles 101 and 102 TFEU in the water pump distribution market. Legal Framework Articles 1, 2, 36 and 37 of Law 3959/2011 Operative part of the Decision The complaint is closed by this Act without any further action as obviously unfounded, pursuant to Article 37 (2), in conjunction with Article 36 (4) of Law 3959/2011. This Act shall be notified to the parties concerned pursuant to Article 37 (3) of the same Law. Company(ies) concerned “TESMA S.A.”  “KSB SE & Co. KGaA”  “EFARMOGES ANTLISIS S.A.”  “KPUMPS PC” Judicial Proceedings - Decisions by the Court of Appeal of Athens (Administrative Division) -
legal_framework: Distribution of pumps and related equipment in the Greek territory
